causalAutopsy.notes: Follow-up to the 2026-06-26 resource-exhaustion panic. #1290 fixed the disk arm; #1291 added the process-footprint MEASUREMENT. This is the first REDUCER: heavy idle MCP servers (Chromium/Electron) stacked across sessions were a dominant footprint; per-session profiles cut the baseline by launching each topic with only the servers it needs. Lever 2 (idle-live offload) follows.
